Text.Page:
Crafting for the War Effort

Support the federation war effort by crafting armor for our soldiers!

We need more recruit's hauberks!

We need more armorsmiths.

If you can pass muster with Hadrak, I'll make sure you get plenty of opportunities to craft for the federation.

Are you up for it?

You look sturdy enough.

Take this pattern. Once you've learned it, you can be useful.
